entries.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
entries.description: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

entries.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
entries.description: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

entries.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
entries.description: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

entries.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
entries.description: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

entries.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
entries.description: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

entries.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
entries.description: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figur

entries.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
entries.description: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

entries.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
entries.description: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

entries.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
entries.description: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

entries.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
entries.description: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app,

entries.title: Anthropic scales Claude Mythos  to critical infrastructure in 15+ countries
entries.description: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing, its security vulnerability program, and access to Mythos to 150 organizations across 15 countries — targeting critical infrastructure in power, water, healthc

entries.title: ZeroDrift raises $10M to protect AI models from themselves
entries.description: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

entries.title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
entries.description: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

entries.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
entries.description: "The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company’s available supply," Alphabet said in its statemen

entries.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
entries.description: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

entries.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
entries.description: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

entries.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
entries.description: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

entries.title: Anthropic files to go public
entries.description: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.

entries.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies

entries.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
entries.description: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

news.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
news.description: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

news.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
news.description: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

news.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
news.description: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

news.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
news.description: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

news.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
news.description: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

news.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
news.description: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

news.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
news.description: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

news.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
news.description: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

news.title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
news.description: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

news.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
news.description: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

news.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
news.description: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

news.title: Anthropic files to go public
news.description: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.
